title: jasminum coffeinum
intro: Jasminum coffeinum, also known as the coffee jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve headaches, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Jasminum coffeinum include reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
